name: freelancer using Upwork processing 5–15 projects/month tool
description: For freelancer using Upwork processing 5–15 projects/month, inconsistent project data formatting causes late reporting. We automate data conversion instead of manual data entry into reporting systems.
problem_solved: Inconsistent project data formatting for reporting
